name: BuyAndHoldStrategy
description: Buys the selected symbol once and holds the position for the rest of the run.

name: SMACrossoverStrategy
description: Buys when a fast moving average rises above a slow moving average and exits when it falls back below.

name: RSIMeanReversionStrategy
description: Buys oversold pullbacks and exits when RSI recovers into overbought territory.

name: MomentumStrategy
description: Buys when lookback return is positive enough and exits when momentum fades.
